REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER NIGEL CHANTER, LAI CHEUNG, PETER BAUMANNN, ALISON BAUMANN, TON-YUN FANG, GNOMES COVE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, BABAC DOANE MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD BY PETITIONERS IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED AND SHALL BE THE FINAL JUDGMENT OF THE COURT. THE ARBITRATOR ACTED WITHIN HIS DISCRETION IN DENYING RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. THERE WAS NO SUBSTANTIAL PREJUDICE CAUSED BY THE DENIAL OF THE CONTINUANCE. THE OPERATIVE "OPERATING AGREEMENT" UPON WHICH THE ARBITRATION AT JAMS WAS BASED DID NOT PRECLUDE THE AWARD OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. TO THE EXTENT THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE FROM THE SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT MAY BE APPLICABLE TO ANY OF THE CLAIMS THE PARTIES VOLUNTARILY SUBMITTED TO JAMS ARBITRATION, THE AWARD WOULD BE CORRECTED TO REFLECT THAT THE ENTIRETY OF THE $48,146,336 AS COMPENSATORY DAMAGES. THIS TENTATIVE RULING SHALL BE TREATED AS A TENTATIVE DECISION. PETITIONER TO PREPARE A PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION AND SUBMIT IT TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN JULY 22, 2024 IN ELECTRONIC FORMAT. RESPONSE TO PETITIONER'S PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION IS DUE AUG-05-24. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: VANESSA WU; REPORTER ELLEN VALENTINE BELLEN, CSR 9575, ELLENBELLEN9575@GMAIL.OM, 707-721-6228. (D501)

To avoid any further confusion, missing filings and potentially duplicate filings: (1) no later than January 2, 2025 petitioner to set hearings on the respondent's claim(s) of exemption attaching a copy of the claim(s) accompanied by points and authorities and evidence, if any; (2) no later than January 16, 2025 respondent to file an opposition supported accompanied by points and authorities and evidence, if any; and (3) no later than January 23, 2025 petitioner to file a reply.
